meta.title: Vineyard Visual System — lighthouse territories
meta.subtitle: Twelve image-only references across Field Ledger, Canopy Signal, and Vintage Control Room.
meta.audience: Commercial-vineyard field crews, supervisors, office specialists, growers, winery intake, finance, auditors, and certifiers
next_outputs: Three editable lighthouse UI direction sheets
Selected visual thesis and DTCG foundations
Mobile field and desktop supervisory screen families

signals.label: Outdoor legibility
signals.description: High contrast, fast state recognition, glove-sized interaction cues, and calm interruption recovery.

signals.label: Stable vineyard identity
signals.description: Parcel geometry, lineage, attributable records, and effective-time history are visible system motifs.

signals.label: Operational density
signals.description: Compact evidence, schedules, quantities, exceptions, and responsibility without generic dashboard decoration.

signals.label: Field-to-office continuity
signals.description: One coherent language from sunlit mobile capture to dense desktop review, settlement, and audit.

items.title: Sunlit field notebook
items.caption: Warm record-keeping tactility without nostalgia or rustic cliché.
items.source: Generated from the vineyard operating model and append-only record contract.
items.motif: field notebook, parcel rule, durable tools
items.prompt: Single editorial photograph in clear morning vineyard light: a durable cream field notebook opened beside clean pruning shears, a soil pencil, a small unmarked brass ruler, and disciplined vine rows receding behind it; tactile paper fibers, olive canvas, terracotta detail, sharp functional composition, premium agricultural documentation, no readable text, no logos, no UI, no collage, no grid.

style.label: Survey precision
style.description: Less lifestyle, more exact field instrument study.
style.promptHint: emphasize survey precision and measured agricultural documentation

palette.label: Bone and vine
palette.description: Reduce terracotta and deepen olive contrast.
palette.promptHint: bone paper, deep vine green, restrained clay accent

scene.label: Tailgate record
scene.description: Move the record ritual to a clean work-truck tailgate.
scene.promptHint: field notebook on a clean work-truck tailgate at sunrise

props.label: Block marker
props.description: Add one unlettered geometric block tag.
props.promptHint: include an unlettered enamel block marker

character.label: Working hands
character.description: Show weathered hands recording evidence, face out of frame.
character.promptHint: weathered vineyard worker hands, face outside frame

items.title: Parcel and lineage map
items.caption: Stable block identity expressed through elegant survey geometry.
items.source: Generated from cross-organization block and alias traceability requirements.
items.motif: parcel boundaries, contour lines, pins, lineage
items.prompt: Single overhead editorial photograph of an abstract vineyard survey sheet on a large worktable, fine parcel boundaries and contour lines without readable labels, a few understated brass pins and translucent tracing layers showing lineage, warm mineral paper, olive ink, clay-red correction mark, exact and modern rather than antique, no logos, no readable text, no UI, no collage, no grid.

style.label: Modern cadastral
style.description: Crisper geometry and less archival wear.
style.promptHint: modern cadastral precision on pristine mineral paper

palette.label: Ink and clay
palette.description: Increase near-black ink with one correction accent.
palette.promptHint: near-black ink and one clay-red correction layer

scene.label: Wall review
scene.description: Place the parcel sheet upright in a planning room.
scene.promptHint: large parcel sheet pinned in a bright operations room

props.label: Tracing overlay
props.promptHint: one translucent tracing overlay offset above the base map

character.label: Reviewer gesture
character.description: One hand follows a boundary without hiding it.
character.promptHint: single reviewer hand tracing a parcel boundary

format.label: Wide system
format.description: Landscape composition for desktop direction boards.
format.promptHint: wide 16:9 composition with generous negative space

items.title: Harvest evidence materials
items.caption: Weight, source, and correction history as tangible evidence.
items.motif: grape sample, scale, paper edge, correction layer
items.prompt: Single close editorial still life at winery intake: a small dark-grape sample tray, stainless scale edge, layered blank weigh-slip papers with one visible colored correction layer but no writing, olive canvas tag, warm afternoon light, rigorous source-to-settlement evidence mood, refined and functional, no readable text, no logos, no UI, no collage, no grid.

style.label: Forensic still life
style.description: Sharper evidence separation and cooler light.
style.promptHint: forensic evidence still life with crisp layer separation

palette.label: Grape accent
palette.description: Use burgundy only in the fruit and correction layer.
palette.promptHint: neutral paper and steel with restrained grape-burgundy accents

scene.label: Intake counter
scene.description: Widen to include the clean intake work surface.

props.label: Seal and tag
props.description: Add an unmarked custody seal and durable tag.
props.promptHint: unmarked custody seal and durable olive tag

character.label: Two-party handoff
character.promptHint: two accountable hands exchanging the sample tray

format.label: Square detail
format.description: Compact square crop for material-system comparison.

items.title: Warm operations planning room
items.caption: A calm bridge from physical field records to dense office decisions.
items.source: Generated from planning, crew, verification, and audit responsibilities.
items.motif: long worktable, parcel sheets, daylight, durable storage
items.prompt: Single wide editorial interior photograph of a professional vineyard operations room in warm daylight, long oak worktable with neatly organized blank parcel sheets, radio, rugged tablet with abstract non-readable blocks, olive storage drawers and one clay accent, dense work without clutter, no people required, no readable text, no logos, no recognizable UI, no collage, no grid.

style.label: Editorial utility
style.description: More architectural order, fewer lifestyle cues.
style.promptHint: architectural editorial utility and disciplined storage

palette.label: Cool mineral
palette.description: Cool the cream while retaining olive and clay.
palette.promptHint: cool mineral walls, dark olive storage, restrained clay accent

scene.label: Morning briefing
scene.description: Add a compact standing crew briefing.
scene.promptHint: small accountable morning briefing around the worktable

props.label: Status rail
props.promptHint: row of unlabeled geometric status markers

character.label: Manager and foreman
character.description: Two people review the same parcel evidence.
character.promptHint: vineyard manager and foreman reviewing parcel evidence, no visible faces required

items.title: Daylight canopy measurement
items.caption: Fresh evidence captured with unmistakable precision outdoors.
items.source: Generated from observation-to-action and maturity workflows.
items.motif: canopy, measurement flag, sensor, hard daylight
items.prompt: Single high-clarity editorial photograph inside a healthy vineyard canopy at bright midday, gloved hand measuring a vine with a clean unbranded instrument and one vivid amber field marker, crisp leaf texture, mineral-white reference card with no writing, deep green and cobalt shadow, purposeful agricultural evidence capture, no readable text, no logos, no UI, no collage, no grid.

style.label: Instrument sharp
style.description: Increase technical precision and reduce softness.
style.promptHint: instrument-grade sharpness and clear evidence focus

palette.label: Chlorophyll cobalt
palette.description: Push green and cool shadow contrast.
palette.promptHint: chlorophyll green, mineral white, cobalt shadows, amber marker

scene.label: Open row
scene.description: Pull back to show the exact block row context.
scene.promptHint: wider vineyard row with measured vine clearly located

props.label: Sample capsule
props.promptHint: small translucent sample capsule clipped to the instrument

character.label: Field specialist
character.description: Show the specialist from shoulder down.
character.promptHint: field specialist in high-visibility workwear, face out of frame

format.label: Mobile portrait
format.description: Vertical composition optimized for field-screen inspiration.

items.title: High-visibility field kit
items.caption: Outdoor readability translated into material and color behavior.
items.source: Generated from field-use accessibility and offline capture constraints.
items.motif: safety yellow, dark tool, matte mineral surface
items.prompt: Single overhead product-style editorial photograph of a vineyard field kit arranged on a clean matte mineral surface: dark green gloves, rugged unbranded handheld device with abstract color blocks and no text, cobalt marker, amber safety tab, small soil sample tube, precise spacing and strong sun-readable contrast, no readable text, no logos, no real UI, no collage, no grid.

style.label: Operational flat lay
style.description: Tighter grid and more tool hierarchy.
style.promptHint: disciplined operational flat lay with strong hierarchy

palette.label: Amber restraint
palette.description: Keep safety color to one small decisive element.
palette.promptHint: mostly mineral white and deep green with one amber safety cue

scene.label: Truck console
scene.description: Move the kit into a clean field-vehicle console.
scene.promptHint: rugged field kit on a clean vineyard truck console

props.label: Offline card
props.description: Add an unmarked durable sync-status card.

character.label: Ready hand
character.description: One gloved hand reaches for the device.
character.promptHint: single gloved hand reaching into the organized kit

format.label: Wide flat lay
format.description: Landscape crop for palette and spacing study.

items.title: Aerial block geometry
items.caption: The vineyard itself becomes the navigation and data-density grammar.
items.source: Generated from block identity, mapping, scheduling, and cross-workflow scope.
items.motif: vine rows, parcel edge, access road, water line
items.prompt: Single straight-down aerial editorial photograph of vineyard blocks forming strong geometric bands, one pale access road, a narrow blue-green water line, a single amber equipment point, clean parcel separations and no labels, visual rhythm suitable for a precise operational map language, no readable text, no logos, no UI, no collage, no grid layout.

style.label: Survey aerial
style.description: More orthographic precision and less cinematic shadow.

palette.label: Mineral map
palette.description: Mute vegetation while preserving functional accents.
palette.promptHint: muted mineral green fields, blue water line, one amber point

scene.label: Slope blocks
scene.promptHint: sloped vineyard blocks with readable contour rhythm

props.label: Vehicle trace
props.description: Add one subtle vehicle movement trace without labels.
props.promptHint: single small vineyard vehicle and subtle dust-free route trace

format.label: Dashboard panorama
format.description: Wide crop with room for dense UI composition studies.
format.promptHint: wide panoramic crop with clear negative margin

items.title: Rugged device in full sun
items.caption: A material proof for mobile contrast, touch scale, and interruption state.
items.source: Generated from mobile field capture, offline, stale, and conflict behavior.
items.motif: rugged handheld, sunlight, glove, status blocks
items.prompt: Single close editorial photograph of a rugged unbranded handheld device held by a gloved vineyard worker in full sun, screen contains only large abstract high-contrast geometric blocks in deep green, cobalt, amber and mineral white with no readable text or recognizable UI, vine row background, glare controlled, decisive touch-scale feel, no logos, no collage, no grid.

style.label: Hard daylight
style.description: Make glare resistance and edge contrast the hero.
style.promptHint: hard daylight with excellent glare control and edge contrast

palette.label: Status trio
palette.description: Use green, cobalt, and amber only as functional blocks.
palette.promptHint: functional green, cobalt and amber status blocks on mineral white

scene.label: Paused work
scene.description: Set the device against a safely paused field task.
scene.promptHint: safely paused vineyard work visible in the background

props.label: Radio clip
props.description: Add a compact unbranded radio clip.
props.promptHint: small unbranded radio clipped to workwear

character.label: Crew leader
character.description: Convey accountable field leadership without portrait focus.
character.promptHint: crew leader posture, face out of frame

format.label: Phone crop
format.promptHint: vertical 4:5 crop centered on the device

items.title: Night intake control bay
items.caption: High-consequence harvest coordination in a rich, controlled environment.
items.source: Generated from harvest command, intake, delay, rejection, and settlement workflows.
items.motif: stainless intake, work lights, deep plum, brass signal
items.prompt: Single cinematic editorial photograph of a professional winery intake bay during night harvest, stainless steel equipment, orderly work lights, deep charcoal and grape-plum shadows, one restrained brass signal lamp, clean traceable material flow and no brand marks, serious operational atmosphere rather than hospitality glamour, no readable text, no logos, no UI, no collage, no grid.

style.label: Control realism
style.description: Reduce cinema and increase operational detail.
style.promptHint: documentary control-room realism with exact material flow

palette.label: Plum restraint
palette.description: Use plum only in shadow and one state cue.
palette.promptHint: charcoal and stainless with restrained plum shadow and brass cue

scene.label: Arrival lane
scene.description: Shift toward load arrival and identity verification.
scene.promptHint: night harvest load arrival lane at winery intake

props.label: Sample tray
props.description: Add one clean grape sample tray at the foreground station.
props.promptHint: clean grape sample tray at the intake station

character.label: Intake team
character.description: Two accountable workers coordinate without staged posing.
character.promptHint: two winery intake workers coordinating naturally

items.title: Grape and gauge detail
items.caption: Premium material character anchored to accountable measurement.
items.source: Generated from maturity, quality disposition, and corrected intake evidence.
items.motif: grape skin, brass gauge, steel, measured light
items.prompt: Single macro editorial photograph of dark grape skins beside a precise unbranded brass-and-steel measuring gauge on a charcoal laboratory surface, raking controlled light, deep plum, warm brass and cool steel, forensic quality-disposition atmosphere, premium but not decorative, no readable text, no logos, no UI, no collage, no grid.

style.label: Laboratory exact
style.description: Sharper neutral measurement and less sensuality.
style.promptHint: neutral laboratory precision and forensic sharpness

palette.label: Steel dominant
palette.description: Cool the scene while preserving one plum sample cue.
palette.promptHint: cool steel and charcoal with one plum grape accent

scene.label: Quality station
scene.description: Pull back to a compact intake quality station.

props.label: Correction layer
props.promptHint: translucent evidence sleeve under the gauge

character.label: Technician hand
character.description: One careful hand adjusts the gauge.
character.promptHint: technician hand carefully adjusting the gauge

items.title: Night harvest grid
items.caption: Urgent work, moving crews, and load identity held in a controlled visual rhythm.
items.source: Generated from urgent harvest replanning and transport handoffs.
items.motif: headlights, vine rows, reflective markers, disciplined motion
items.prompt: Single elevated editorial photograph of an active night harvest with parallel vine rows, disciplined pools of work light, a few small vehicles and workers, reflective amber markers and deep plum-black sky, clear operational lanes and controlled urgency, no tourism romance, no readable text, no logos, no UI, no collage, no grid layout.

style.label: Operational documentary
style.description: More real work detail and less atmosphere.
style.promptHint: operational documentary realism, clear crews and equipment lanes

palette.label: Amber state cues
palette.description: Reserve amber for movement and hazard markers.
palette.promptHint: charcoal scene with amber movement and hazard markers only

scene.label: Truck delay
scene.description: Show a safe delayed load and dispatch response.
scene.promptHint: safely delayed harvest truck with coordinated dispatch response

character.label: Crew pattern
character.description: Show accountable crew clusters rather than anonymous silhouettes.
character.promptHint: small accountable crew groups in clear work zones

format.label: Panoramic rows
format.description: Extra-wide row rhythm for dense desktop inspiration.

items.title: Controlled evidence archive
items.caption: Certification and settlement history with gravitas and precise lineage.
items.source: Generated from audit, certification, correction, and historical review scenarios.
items.motif: dark archive, brass index, translucent version layers
items.prompt: Single editorial interior detail of a modern controlled evidence archive: matte charcoal drawers, refined brass index pulls without labels, translucent record sleeves showing layered versions with no writing, one deep-plum divider and soft focused light, institutional trust and append-only history, no readable text, no logos, no UI, no collage, no grid.

style.label: Modern registry
style.description: Crisper institutional order and less luxury styling.
style.promptHint: modern institutional registry with exact orderly storage

palette.label: Graphite and bone
palette.description: Reduce brass and plum to small structural accents.
palette.promptHint: graphite, bone, minimal brass and plum accents

scene.label: Audit table
scene.description: Move layered records to a review table.
scene.promptHint: layered evidence sleeves on a controlled audit table

props.label: Version tabs
props.promptHint: blank geometric predecessor and successor tabs

character.label: Auditor review
character.description: One auditor examines lineage without portrait focus.
character.promptHint: auditor hands examining layered record lineage

format.label: Vertical archive
format.description: Tall composition for history and version motifs.
